docs.title: Enterprise Architecture Playbook
docs.text:
Welcome to the Enterprise Architecture Playbook.

This project is an open-source knowledge base for:

  • Enterprise Architects
  • Solution Architects
  • Cloud Architects
  • Software Architects
  • Technical Leaders
